pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes to this file path.
setup_task.sh explicitly writes 4 data rows to the TSV file.
setup_task.sh strictly defines these exact 4 names in the TSV file content.
setup_task.sh strictly defines this customer name and email address in the final TSV row.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on a synthetically generated TSV file created by the setup script at /home/ga/Documents/new_leads.tsv. The file contains exactly 4 records with the names 'Bon app'', 'Bottom-Dollar Markets', 'Cactus Comidas para llevar', and 'Die Wandernde Kuh'. The specific verification target, 'Die Wandernde Kuh', has the email address 'orders@wanderndekuh.de'. All metadata claims exactly match the hardcoded values in the setup script.
